name: ChkStart_LINSyncDelTimingViolation
title: ChkStart_LINSyncDelTimingViolation
syntax: dword ChkStart_LINSyncDelTimingViolation (float MinDelLen, float MaxDelLen, char[] CaplCallback);
description: Checks the timing of the synchronization break field in LIN headers.
An event will be generated, if the measured length [in bit times] of break delimiter is outside of the specified range.

parameters.description: Minimum length of break delimiter shall not be checked
Minimum allowed length of break delimiter
Maximum length of break delimiter shall not be checked
Maximum allowed length of break delimiter

parameters.name: CaplCallback
parameters.description: Name of CAPL callback function to be called on generated event. In simulation nodes this parameter has to be set. In test modules this parameter is optional.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
